title: sedum racemiferum
intro: Sedum racemiferum, also known as the Clustered Stonecrop or Racemose Sedum, is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sedum racemiferum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections, as well as its ability to reduce blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Sedum racemiferum can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or by making a tincture or salve from the plant's extracts.
